mine.desert.desc: Flat, dry, soft rocks. Easy money to get started.
mine.desert.name: Desert Quarry
mine.mountain.desc: Steep terrain, harder rocks, better ore.
mine.mountain.name: Mountain Ridge
mine.tropical.desc: Dense jungle canopy above endgame rocks and rare ore.
mine.tropical.name: Tropical Depths
ore.absurdium.desc: Absurdly valuable. Found in the hardest rocks.
ore.absurdium.name: Absurdium
ore.blingite.name: Blingite
ore.craktonite.desc: Cracks under pressure, but worth a fortune.
ore.craktonite.name: Craktonite

ore.dirtite.name: Dirtite
ore.gloomium.name: Gloomium
ore.rustite.name: Rustite
ore.sparkium.name: Sparkium
ore.treranium.name: Treranium
rock.absurdite.desc: Absurdly hard. Nature's joke on miners.
rock.absurdite.name: Absurdite
rock.clunkite.desc: Makes a satisfying clunk when you hit it.
rock.clunkite.name: Clunkite
rock.cruite.desc: Soft, chalky, crumbles if you look at it wrong.
rock.cruite.name: Cruite
rock.gnarlite.name: Gnarlite
rock.grumpite.desc: Grumpy-looking stone that resists with a frown.
rock.grumpite.name: Grumpite
rock.molite.desc: Soft and yielding, like warm butter with grit.
rock.molite.name: Molite
rock.obstiite.name: Obstiite
rock.sandite.desc: Compacted sand pretending to be rock.
rock.sandite.name: Sandite
rock.stubite.desc: Stubbornly refuses to fracture on the first try.
rock.stubite.name: Stubite
rock.titanite.desc: Titan-class hardness. Only Dynatomics will crack it.
rock.titanite.name: Titanite

vehicle.excavator.name: Excavator
vehicle.truck.name: Truck
level.dusty_hollow.name: Dusty Hollow
level.dusty_hollow.desc: A sun-baked desert quarry where ambitions are as dry as the landscape. Perfect for beginners who'd rather not immediately go bankrupt.
level.grumpstone_ridge.name: Grumpstone Ridge
level.grumpstone_ridge.desc: A mountain site where the rocks are as surly as the union representatives. Neighbours will complain. That's their problem.
level.treranium_depths.name: Treranium Depths
level.treranium_depths.desc: A lush tropical hellhole packed with treranium, mafia enforcers, and three villages that collectively hate you. The rocks here didn't read the rulebook — some crumble like wet biscuits, others laugh at your best explosives.
campaign.bankrupt: Bankrupt! The mine has been seized.
campaign.arrested: Arrested! Too much exposure. The level is over.
campaign.ecology_shutdown: Mine shutdown! Ecological violations triggered government closure.
campaign.revolt_warning: Warning: workers on the verge of revolt!
campaign.revolt_triggered: Worker revolt! Permanent strike. The level is over.

tutorial.title: Tutorial
tutorial.step1: Welcome! Start by surveying the terrain to find ore deposits.
tutorial.step2: Place drill holes where you found ore. Use the Blast Plan panel.
tutorial.step3: Set charges on your holes, then execute the blast!
tutorial.step4: Accept a contract to sell your ore. Check the Contracts panel.
tutorial.done: You're ready to mine! Good luck.
